title: lomaria colensoi
intro: Lomaria colensoi, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. Lomaria colensoi can be prepared as an infusion, poultice, or salve, although the specific herbal preparations and dosages may vary depending on the intended use and cultural tradition.
